key.name: extra-language
key.description: Optional secondary language for text extraction. Leave empty to disable.

key.name: autocopy
key.description: Automatically copy the extracted text to the clipboard.

key.name: autolinks
key.description: When enabled, QR code URLs open directly in the browser. When disabled, a desktop notification with an action button is shown instead.

key.name: tts-volume
key.description: Volume level for text-to-speech playback (0.0 to 1.0).

key.name: tts-language
key.description: Language code for text-to-speech. Empty means use the active OCR language.

key.name: ocr-preprocessing
key.description: Level of image and text preprocessing before and after OCR.

key.name: magic-processor-enabled
key.description: When enabled, extracted text is automatically reformatted using heuristic rules (URL, email, paragraph detection).

key.name: tessdata-model
key.description: Choose between speed-optimized (fast), balanced (standard), or accuracy-optimized (best) Tesseract language models.
